Dance Instruction Services

Master the dances that matter for your celebration. Whether it’s a first dance, father-daughter moment, or group choreography, our regionally-awarded instructor brings skill, patience, and professionalism to every lesson.

What We Teach

Dance Styles

  • Country Two Step - Perfect for country weddings and celebrations
  • Waltz - Classic elegance for formal events
  • Swing - High-energy, fun, and infectious
  • Salsa - Passion and rhythm in every step
  • Bachata - Romantic and intimate

Who We Work With

  • Couples - Especially wedding couples preparing their first dance
  • Individuals - Build confidence and learn for any occasion
  • Groups - Father-daughter, family dances, or multi-couple lessons

Wedding Packages

Our most popular service! Perfect for couples who want to dance confidently on their big day.

4-Lesson Package

$299

  • 1-hour lessons, 1x per week
  • Includes bride and groom
  • Learn one signature first dance
  • Ideal for experienced dancers

6-Lesson Package

$429

  • 1-hour lessons, 1-2x per week
  • Includes bride and groom
  • Learn multiple dances or complex choreography
  • Our most popular package!

8-Lesson Package

$549

  • 1-hour lessons, 2x per week
  • Includes bride and groom
  • Father-of-bride dance included
  • Practice with family members (up to 2 additional people per lesson)

Lesson Options

In-Studio Lessons

Location: Madison, Georgia Studio

  • Spacious, climate-controlled studio
  • Full-length mirrors for technique feedback
  • Professional audio system

In-Home Lessons

Available throughout Georgia

  • We travel to you
  • $50 travel fee applies
  • Perfect if you prefer privacy or convenience

Lesson Structure

  1. Warm-up - Get loose and review previous material
  2. New Material - Learn steps, timing, and styling
  3. Choreography - Put it all together with music
  4. Practice - Refine and build confidence
  5. Cool-down - Review key points for home practice

What to Expect

  • Personalized Attention - Every couple is unique; lessons are tailored to your pace and goals
  • Clear Instructions - Both lead and follow positions are taught equally
  • Musical Selection - We work with your music choice or help you select the perfect song
  • Confidence Building - Our goal is for you to feel amazing on your special day

Ready to Book?

Contact us to schedule your consultation and discuss which package is right for you. First-time clients can request a 15-minute consultation call (no obligation).
